name: Southern Comfort Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large punch bowl, combine the frozen lemon juice, frozen orange juice, and lemonade concentrate.
2. Add the Southern Comfort liqueur to the mixture.
3. Stir gently until well combined.
4. Just before serving, add the frozen 7-Up syrup (lemon and orange slices optional).
5. Serve over ice in punch bowls or glasses.
Note: This recipe is designed for parties or gatherings, so adjust quantities accordingly based on your guest count.
